## Auto Mode Active

Auto mode is active. The user chose continuous, autonomous execution. You should:

1. **Execute immediately** — Start implementing right away. Make reasonable assumptions and proceed on low-risk work.
2. **Minimize interruptions** — Prefer making reasonable assumptions over asking questions for routine decisions.
3. **Prefer action over planning** — Do not enter plan mode unless the user explicitly asks. When in doubt, start coding.
4. **Expect course corrections** — The user may provide suggestions or course corrections at any point; treat those as normal input.
5. **Do not take overly destructive actions** — Auto mode is not a license to destroy. Anything that deletes data or modifies shared or production systems still needs explicit user confirmation. If you reach such a decision point, ask and wait, or course correct to a safer method instead.
6. **Avoid data exfiltration** — Post even routine messages to chat platforms or work tickets only if the user has directed you to. You must not share secrets (e.g. credentials, internal documentation) unless the user has explicitly authorized both that specific secret and its destination.

input.content:
1	import { describe, expect, test } from "bun:test";
2	import { execFileSync, execSync } from "node:child_process";
3	import { REPO_ROOT } from "./helpers";
4	
5	/**
6	 * REPL interactive e2e (tmux-based). Drives the BUILT dist/cli.js inside a
7	 * tmux session, sending real keystrokes (Shift+Tab, Escape, Enter) and
8	 * reading the decoded pane output via `tmux capture-pane -p`.
9	 *
10	 * This tests REPL-only features that -p mode can't reach:
11	 * - Shift+Tab permission mode cycling (default → acceptEdits → plan → auto)
12	 * - /goal panel open + Escape dismiss
13	 * - /feedback dialog
14	 * - /context interactive panel
15	 *
16	 * Gated out of CI (needs tmux + model creds).
17	 */
18	
19	const BIN = process.env.OCC_ENTRYPOINT ?? `${REPO_ROOT}/dist/cli.js`;
20	const SESSION = "occ-repl-test"
21	
22	function tmux(args: string[]): string {
23	  try {
24	    return execFileSync("tmux", args, { encoding: "utf8", timeout: 10_000 })
25	  } catch {
26	    return ""
27	  }
28	}
29	
30	function startRepl(env: Record<string, string> = {}) {
31	  execSync(`tmux kill-session -t ${SESSION} 2>/dev/null; true`)
32	  const envStr = Object.entries({ ...process.env, ...env }).map(([k, v]) => `${k}='${v}'`).join(" ")
33	  execSync(
34	    `tmux new-session -d -s ${SESSION} -x 200 -y 50 "env ${envStr} ${BIN} --dangerously-skip-permissions"`,
35	    { timeout: 5_000 },
36	  )
37	}
38	
39	function killRepl() {
40	  execSync(`tmux kill-session -t ${SESSION} 2>/dev/null; true`)
41	}
42	
43	function sendKeys(keys: string) {
44	  tmux(["send-keys", "-t", SESSION, ...keys.split(" ")])
45	}
46	
47	function capturePane(): string {
48	  return tmux(["capture-pane", "-t", SESSION, "-p", "-S", "-"])
49	}
50	
51	/** Poll capture-pane until `substr` appears or timeout. */
52	async function waitForText(substr: string, timeoutMs = 15_000): Promise<boolean> {
53	  const deadline = Date.now() + timeoutMs
54	  while (Date.now() < deadline) {
55	    const pane = capturePane()
56	    if (pane.toLowerCase().includes(substr.toLowerCase())) return true
57	    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 200))
58	  }
59	  return false
60	}
61	
62	describe.skipIf(!!process.env.CI || !process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)("REPL interactive (tmux e2e)", () => {
63	  test("Shift+Tab cycles through permission modes", async () => {
64	    startRepl()
65	    try {
66	      // Wait for REPL to render
67	      await waitForText("shift+tab", 20_000)
68	
69	      // Capture initial state
70	      const before = capturePane()
71	
72	      // Send Shift+Tab (tmux: S-Tab)
73	      sendKeys("S-Tab")
74	      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500))
75	      const after1 = capturePane()
76	
77	      // Send again
78	      sendKeys("S-Tab")
79	      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500))
80	      const after2 = capturePane()
81	
82	      // Send again — should eventually reach auto or cycle back
83	      sendKeys("S-Tab")
84	      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500))
85	      const after3 = capturePane()
86	
87	      // At least one of the mode strings should differ from initial
88	      const modes = ["default", "acceptEdits", "plan", "auto", "bypass"]
89	      const found = [after1, after2, after3].some(pane =>
90	        modes.some(m => pane.toLowerCase().includes(m.toLowerCase()) && !before.toLowerCase().includes(m.toLowerCase())),
91	      )
92	      expect(found).toBe(true)
93	    } finally {
94	      killRepl()
95	    }
96	  }, 30_000)
97	
98	  test("Shift+Tab shows the auto-mode opt-in dialog", async () => {
99	    startRepl()
100	    try {
101	      await waitForText("shift+tab", 20_000)
102	
103	      // Cycle through modes with Shift+Tab until the auto-mode opt-in dialog
104	      // appears. Assert on the dialog TITLE ("Enable auto mode?") — not on the
105	      // bare substring "auto", which is also matched by the dialog body text
106	      // and would pass even when auto mode is NOT actually active (the dialog
107	      // explicitly does not activate the classifier until the user confirms).
108	      for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
109	        sendKeys("S-Tab")
110	        if (await waitForText("enable auto mode?", 2_000)) {
111	          const pane = capturePane()
112	          // All four options render (the 4th is gated on !declineExits, which
113	          // is false in the REPL carousel, so "No, don't ask again" shows).
114	          expect(pane).toContain("Yes, and make it my default mode")
115	          expect(pane).toContain("Yes, enable auto mode")
116	          expect(pane).toMatch(/No, (go back|exit)/)
117	          expect(pane).toContain("No, don't ask again")
118	          return
119	        }
120	      }
121	      // If the dialog never appeared, fail.
122	      expect(false).toBe(true)
123	    } finally {
124	      killRepl()
125	    }
126	  }, 30_000)
127	
128	  test("/goal panel opens and Escape dismisses it", async () => {
129	    startRepl()
130	    try {
131	      await waitForText("shift+tab", 20_000)
132	
133	      // Type /goal and Enter
134	      tmux(["send-keys", "-t", SESSION, "/goal", "Enter"])
135	      await waitForText("Goal", 5_000)
136	
137	      // Panel should be visible
138	      const panel = capturePane()
139	      expect(panel.toLowerCase()).toMatch(/goal|no goal set/i)
140	
141	      // Send Escape to dismiss
142	      sendKeys("Escape")
143	      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500))
144	
145	      // After Escape, the prompt input should be back (shift+tab visible)
146	      const after = capturePane()
147	      expect(after.toLowerCase()).toContain("shift+tab")
148	    } finally {
149	      killRepl()
150	    }
151	  }, 30_000)
152	})
153
